candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text:
As shown in the diagram above, two resting blocks (4.0 kg and 8.0 kg) have a massless spring (spring constant 2,400 N/m) compressed between them. Upon release from the spring, the 8.0 kg block moves to the right at 10.0 m/s on a frictionless surface.

Calculate the vertical distance the 8.0-kg block moves up the curved ramp.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 如图所示,两个质量分别为$4.0\,\mathrm{kg}$和$8.0\,\mathrm{kg}$的物块通过一个无质量弹簧(弹性系数为$2400\,\mathrm{N/m}$)相连。当释放弹簧后,$8.0\,\mathrm{kg}$物块在无摩擦水平面上以$10.0\,\mathrm{m/s}$的速度向右运动。计算$8.0\,\mathrm{kg}$物块在弯曲坡道上所能达到的最大垂直高度。(只需给出数值答案)
